series_metadata.series_description: Grant agreements, invoices & expenditure reports, support documentation, RFPs, award letters, reports, draw requests, sole source letters, associated documentation and emails.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Three years from the date of submission of the final expenditure report or, for Federal awards that are renewed quarterly or annually, from the date of the submission of the quarterly or annual financial report, respectively, as reported to the Federal awarding agency or pass-through entity in the case of a subrecipient., Electronic: Delete
